nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I normally use AI for repetitive tasks such as creating duplicates of pages

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I currently do not use AI for any creative tasks

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I always check the individual files for mistakes after it has sent me the .ZIP but I haven't had any issues so far

nodes.label: AI autonomy in task execution
nodes.grounding_span: I just give it the information upfront and it is very good at what it does

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: This saves me a lot of time and it's very boring work doing it manually

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I really enjoy completing the design process myself

nodes.label: Originality and uniqueness
nodes.grounding_span: I also feel it will be more original and unique if I create it myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I was really satisfied as this saved me hours of very boring repetitive work

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use AI for that

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as a key skill
nodes.grounding_span: I haven't had any issues so far

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of skill obsolescence
nodes.grounding_span: one day my job will probably be obsolete ... There's nothing I can do about that so I don't let it get to me

nodes.label: Task-specific compartmentalization
nodes.grounding_span: I currently do not use AI for any creative tasks

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of technological change
nodes.grounding_span: There's nothing I can do about that so I don't let it get to me
